name: Add FFT Plot Widget to OpenBCI GUI
description: The OpenBCI GUI is running an active Synthetic EEG session with a multi-panel layout. Configure one of the widget panels to display the FFT (Fast Fourier Transform) Plot. The FFT Plot widget shows the frequency spectrum of the EEG signal, with the x-axis representing frequency (in Hz) and the y-axis showing signal amplitude. Each channel is color-coded to match the Time Series display. At least one widget panel must display the FFT Plot visualization.
